'''Glakka''' was an [[Water/Legends|ice]]-covered [[Moon/Legends|moon]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] where [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] had a gun-running operation along with [[Chevin/Legends|Chevin]] criminal [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]]. The two tried to steal an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] weapons cache, but were ambushed by an Imperial squad. They barely survived the attack and almost died in the subzero [[Temperature/Legends|temperatures]] at night.

{{Planet-stub}}
